zs-crunch-salad.name: Z's Crunch Salad
instructions: Cook bacon in a large, deep skillet over medium-high heat, turning occasionally, until crisp, about 10 minutes. Drain on a paper towel-lined plate; crumble.
Toss broccoli, grapes, celery, jicama, and green onions together in a large bowl.
Whisk mayonnaise, sugar, vinegar, and curry powder together in a bowl until dressing well blended.
Pour dressing over vegetables; toss to coat. Add crumbled bacon and pine nuts; toss to combine.

zesty-potato-chips.name: Zesty Potato Chips
instructions: Soak potatoes in some water for 20 minutes. Then, slice in thin oval slices and mix with seasonings.
Heat ¼ cup of olive oil in a skillet on high heat.
Fry potato slices in batches. Drain in paper-towel-lined colander and toss in salt and pepper, to taste.
Serve and enjoy!

zucchini-bread-with-coconut.name: Zucchini Bread With Coconut
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Lightly grease a 9x5-inch loaf pan.
Place grated zucchini in a colander in the sink. Squeeze out as much liquid with your hands as possible.
Combine flour, coconut flakes, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a mixing bowl.

Beat sugar, oil, vanilla sugar, and cinnamon in a separate bowl with an electric mixer until foamy. Mix in zucchini and eggs. Pour wet ingredients into dry ingredients and stir until well combined. Pour into the prepared loaf pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center of the loaf comes out clean, about 1 hour.
Remove from the oven and let cool in the pan for 10 minutes. Invert onto a wire rack and let cool completely.

zucchini-salad-with-herbs-and-red-onion.name: Zucchini Salad With Herbs And Red Onion

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place water in a medium pot; bring to a boil. Place red onion in a sieve; submerge in the boiling water and blanch for 1 minute. Cool under cold running water; set aside.

Fill a large bowl with ice and cold water; set aside. Place zucchini slices into the boiling water; cook for 30 seconds. Remove zucchini from the water and immediately immerse in ice water; stir with a wooden spoon so they cool evenly. Drain. Drip dry.
Place zucchini in a salad bowl; stir in mint and basil until well combined.
Whisk olive oil, lemon zest, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper together in a small bowl; pour over salad and toss to combine.
Chill in the refrigerator before serving for 30 minutes.

zucchini-with-cheese-in-a-bread-dish-lez.name: Zucchini With Cheese In A Bread Dish
instructions: 1. Remove the edges of tost bread.
2. Refine the inner parts of the bread to be 2-3 mm thick with the roller.
3. Remove rounds from bread with round cookie mold.
4. Remove olive oil from the back and front parts with brush.
5. Bake breads into muffin molds and cook until about 5 minutes in the oven heated in advance, pink.
6. Leave. from the oven.
7. Add olive oil to the pan and heat it.
8. Cook for a few minutes by adding garlic and coarse.
9. Add salt and pepper and get from the stove.
10. Add and mix cheeses.
11. 11. Add and mix walnuts, beans, flax seeds and dereot.
12. In the bread bowls you prepared with tost bread, add a spoon from cheese pumpkin mortar and serve.
